# Chapter 6: Integration  (~110 pp)
- 6.1 The integral as accumulation (12)
- 6.2 Fundamental theorem of calculus (10)
- 6.3 Techniques: substitution, parts, partial fractions (18)
- 6.4 Improper integrals (10)
- 6.5 Numerical integration: trapezoidal, Simpson, Gauss (15)
- 6.6 Multiple integrals preview (12)
- 6.7 Convolution introduced (12)
- 6.8 Failure section: when an integral does not exist or does not converge (10)
- 6.9 Worked examples: centre of mass, moment of inertia, work, expectation (11)

**Archetype**: balance, transport. **Project**: compute the moment of inertia of a household object three ways; reconcile. **Exercises**: 40.
